description_long: This house complex features a modern, blocky architectural design with multiple interconnected structures, including a main building and several annexes. The exterior is finished in a combination of white, gray, and muted red tones, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The property is set on a paved lot with adjacent sidewalks and two-lane roads, and includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The main entrance is marked by a small porch and steps, while the flat roofs and clean lines emphasize a contemporary aesthetic. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows facing the street. The overall layout suggests a multi-family or townhouse configuration, blending residential comfort with urban functionality.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, finished in white, gray, and muted red. The design features clean lines, paved access, and a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped area with trees and a small porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the building, additional windows, and the main road frontage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the main structure, more greenery, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the annexes, additional landscaping, and the paved lot with parking spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a simple modern door, flanked by landscaping and minimal decorative elements.
